heading: Authority for program
label: 11221 Authority for program
text: The Secretary is authorized to make grants and to provide technical assistance to public and nonprofit private entities to establish and operate transitional living youth projects for homeless youth.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 5714–1 of Title 42
Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 363 and is classified to .section 321 of Pub. L. 93–415section 11275 of this title

Amendments1999— struck out “Purpose and” before “Authority” in section catchline and struck out subsec. (a) designation before “The Secretary” and subsec. (b) which defined “homeless youth” and “transitional living youth project”.Pub. L. 106–71
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1988 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1988section 7296(a) of Pub. L. 100–690section 11101 of this title
